page: Microsoft Azure E48nds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual server belonging to the Endv6 family. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server includes 2835 GB of local storage and is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-throughput external storage volumes. Additionally, the instance is classified as network-optimized, designed to handle workloads requiring elevated network throughput. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this instance.

From a resource density perspective, the E48nds_v6 offers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for memory-bound workloads compared to general-purpose instances. However, the lack of dedicated GPU hardware limits its utility for parallel computing tasks like machine learning acceleration. The inclusion of a substantial 2835 GB local disk provides high-capacity temporary storage, reducing the immediate need for external disk attachments for scratch space.
The hardware profile of the E48nds_v6 is structured for memory-intensive applications, large-scale databases, enterprise applications, and network-heavy data processing tasks.
description: The Microsoft Azure E48nds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Endv6 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and is configured with 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-to-core ratio. This network-optimized instance includes 2835 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage for high-performance disk configurations. Lacking integrated GPU hardware, the server is designed for non-accelerated workloads. The high memory density and substantial local storage capacity make this instance qualitatively cost-effective for memory-intensive applications, large databases, and network-heavy data processing. It is well-suited for enterprise resource planning systems, relational databases, and high-throughput data analytics pipelines.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E48nds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual server featuring 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and 2835 GB of local storage, optimized for memory-intensive and network-heavy workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized, network-ready virtual server featuring forty-eight dedicated Intel vCPUs, substantial local storage, and high memory density.

384.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
2835 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability

Suited for large databases, memory-intensive applications, and network-heavy workloads
